summary: Tested Employee self-edit permissions feature. All 12 specified features verified. Backend PATCH /api/employees/{emp_id}/self works correctly with ownership check. Frontend SelfProfileModal shows Edit Profile button, edit mode with locked/editable fields, Work Info read-only, Bank Info editable, save/cancel flows all working.

test_results.self_edit_toggle_btn_visible: PASS - Edit Profile button in SelfProfileModal header
test_results.edit_mode_personal_info: PASS - Address, City, State, Zipcode, Emergency Contact fields are editable inputs
test_results.locked_fields_count: PASS - 8 opacity-50 locked fields (First Name, Last Name, Email, Phone, DOB, Gender, Qualification, Country)
test_results.emergency_contact_editable: PASS - Name, Number, Relation all editable
test_results.work_info_readonly: PASS - Work Info tab all read-only with 'Work information can only be updated by HR Admin.' note
test_results.bank_info_editable: PASS - Bank Name, Account Name, Account Number, IFSC Code all editable
test_results.camera_icon_edit_mode: PASS - Camera/edit icon on avatar visible in edit mode
test_results.save_button: PASS - Save Changes button calls PATCH and shows 'Profile updated successfully' toast
test_results.returns_to_view_mode: PASS - After save, Edit Profile button reappears (view mode restored)
test_results.admin_gets_403_on_gm002_self: PASS - Admin session returns 403 for PATCH /GM002/self
test_results.gm002_own_self_edit: PASS - GM002 session returns 200 for PATCH /GM002/self with updated fields
test_results.locked_fields_not_updatable: PASS - first_name not changed when sent via self endpoint (Pydantic model excludes it)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Self-edit feature fully working. Admin session: test_session_1775319753739, GM002 session: gm002_test_session (recreated, valid 24h). Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_self_edit.py
